_comment: SAMPLE / FIXTURE ONLY — the leading underscore in the filename marks this as a schema demo, not real ground truth. The harness ignores _-prefixed files. Facts below are fabricated-but-realistic. Replace with a real hand-labeled doc via the add-golden-doc skill. Shape is a FLAT instance of the canonical CivicEvent record in ingest/extract/schemas.py (no `event` wrapper); every EXTRACTED field carries a provenance entry with a verbatim source_quote (Rule 3 — Quote the source); synthesized fields (e.g. summary) are exempt — they have no single verbatim source.
title: ULURP C 240123 ZMM — proposed zoning map amendment, 215 West 96th Street
summary: Community Board 7 (Manhattan) Land Use Committee to hear a proposed zoning map amendment rezoning 215 West 96th Street from R7-2 to R8A to permit a larger residential building.
